en: If your company performs any of the following services and is required to maintain the relevant certification(s) for those services, you will be asked to provide your certificate in a subsequent form.

The Italy Single Certificate of Tax Compliance (DURF) is a certificate issued by the Italian Revenue Agency that verifies a company’s compliance with specific tax obligations, including the regular payment of withholding taxes on income from dependent and similar work.\n\nLegislative Decree n. 241, Art. 17-bis on Normattiva
Does your company perform activities in Italy that require the Italy Single Certificate of Tax Compliance (DURF), and are you required to maintain a valid DURF certificate?
Please select from the following reasons why your company is exempt from needing an Italy Single Certificate of Tax Compliance (DURF).
The company is exclusively based and operates in a foreign country with no economic activities in Italy.
The company’s operations are covered by tax treaty exemptions between Italy and the country where it is resident.
Please explain why your company is exempt from needing an Italy Single Certificate of Tax Compliance (DURF).
